description: CompositionMaroon red T-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has ribbing around the neckline and tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and  slightly distressed look graphic print on the frontFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWram iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryUpdate your casual style with this maroon T-shirt from probase. The slightly distressed look graphic print on the front depicting a stylized image of Mahatma Gandhi and the word "Peace" imbibes this tee with a patriotic feel. Team this with jeans and sneakers for a cool look, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
